identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Talent Cockpit' for Indian Corporate Hiring that blends Swiss precision with human warmth.
principles: Fusion: Air Traffic Control aesthetics x Human Resources warmth
Density with Breath: High data density (Control Room) but with generous padding inside containers
Context is King: Light mode for clarity, Dark mode for power users
Privacy by Design: Visual masking for sensitive data (DPDP Act)

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm dark:border-slate-800 dark:bg-slate-950

Button.primary: bg-[#1e1b4b] hover:bg-[#312e81] text-white shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95

Badge.base: rounded-md px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

privacy_shield.description: Blur overlay for sensitive fields (Caste, Religion, Age)
privacy_shield.classes: backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-200/50 cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-200/30 transition-all flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-mono text-slate-500 border border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded

kanban_column.base: min-w-[320px] bg-slate-50/50 rounded-xl border border-slate-200/60 p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 h-full

dpdp_act.consent_log: Must display timestamp, IP, and method of consent for every candidate.
dpdp_act.purge_button: Destructive action with 2-step confirmation. Animation: 'Shredding' effect.
dpdp_act.sensitive_data: Fields like PAN, Aadhaar, Caste must be masked by default with 'Privacy Shield' component.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Apply the 'colors' section to tailwind.config.js immediately.
2. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Control Room' grid for the Admin Dashboard.
3. KANBAN: Implement horizontal scrolling with 'snap-x' for the pipeline. Use the 'kanban_column' styles.
4. PRIVACY: Wrap all sensitive data fields (PAN, Aadhaar, Religion) in a component that implements the 'privacy_shield' style.
5. IMAGES: Use the provided Pexels URLs for avatars and login backgrounds. DO NOT use placeholders.
6. TESTIDS: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, drag-handles).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
